technology.title: Tech Now
technology.summary: Alasdair Keane visits the underground insect farm turning food waste into animal feed.

briefing.news_focus: Alasdair Keane visits the underground insect farm turning food waste into animal feed.
briefing.background: 此議題通常涉及生成式 AI、模型能力競爭、算力供應，以及商業化與監管之間的平衡。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於誰能掌握模型能力、算力資源與商業應用場景，同時控制成本與政策風險。

technology.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
technology.summary: The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

briefing.news_focus: The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.
briefing.background: 此議題反映科技產業近期的重要動向，通常涉及商業競爭、產品策略與政策環境。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力通常在於技術節奏、商業模式與市場預期的重新調整。

politics.title: Pentagon restrictions on press violate First Amendment, judge rules
politics.summary: The Department of Defense had required reporters to agree to certain rules on what information they could gather in order to maintain access to the Pentagon.

briefing.news_focus: The Department of Defense had required reporters to agree to certain rules on what information they could gather in order to maintain access to the Pentagon.
briefing.background: 安全與衝突議題通常牽涉軍事風險、外交回應、能源與市場連動效應。
briefing.analysis: 主要角力在於軍事升高風險、外交降溫空間與國際成本分攤。

politics.title: Thousands evacuated as Hawaii faces worst flooding in 20 years
politics.summary: More than 230 people have been rescued so far, the authorities said on Friday.

briefing.news_focus: More than 230 people have been rescued so far, the authorities said on Friday.
briefing.background: 美中相關議題通常同時涉及戰略競爭、貿易規則、科技限制與區域安全。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於經濟互賴與戰略脫鉤之間如何重新劃界。

economy.title: US lifts sanctions on some Iranian oil as energy prices soar
economy.summary: The treasury secretary says the move will quickly bring about 140m barrels of oil to global markets.

briefing.news_focus: The treasury secretary says the move will quickly bring about 140m barrels of oil to global markets.
briefing.background: 通膨新聞通常反映價格壓力、需求強弱、供應鏈變化與政策回應。
briefing.analysis: 主要角力在於成本轉嫁能力、實質購買力與政策調整節奏。

economy.title: Comic Relief helps fund free school uniform charity
economy.summary: Julie Waller, who heads up the charity, says donations have helped more than 2,000 families.

briefing.news_focus: Julie Waller, who heads up the charity, says donations have helped more than 2,000 families.
briefing.background: 此議題反映總體經濟或市場的重要變化，通常與政策預期與風險偏好有關。
briefing.analysis: 主要角力在於成長、價格穩定與市場信心之間的平衡。
